temples.name: Nagdevta Temple
temples.description: A serene temple dedicated to Lord Shiva, nestled in the beautiful hills of Kunda, Tehri Garhwal.

videos.title: Nagdevta Temple Darshan
videos.description: Temple moments captured in motion with devotion.

pradhanProfile.name: Pyarelal Nautiyal
pradhanProfile.desc1: A dedicated village leader committed to the development of Kunda Gram Panchayat.
pradhanProfile.desc2: Successfully led multiple initiatives including temple renovation and road development.
pradhanProfile.desc3: Together we will preserve our cultural heritage.
